official_functions.role: Write the full Configuration clientbound framed ping packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed ping packet
Write the full Configuration serverbound framed pong packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration serverbound framed pong packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration serverbound state
Read the decoded payload ids from the official packet instances

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the ping body.
The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the pong body.
The official Configuration protocol codecs dispatch the framed packet ids back to their ping/pong packet classes.
The decoded official ClientboundPingPacket and ServerboundPongPacket preserve the payload id.
The framed bytes, packet table ids, body bytes, decoded packet classes, decoded ids, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove runtime ping response behavior, keep-alive behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer initialized runtime behavior or Configuration-to-Play readiness.
